itemListElement.reviewBody:
I'm Smita Singh, my child is currently studying in 8th grade. A recent event, the RND truly has made an impact over the screen time of adults and adolescents.  We can all appreciate how this organized and well put together event has helped our children get a proper depth on understanding the aftermath of excessive screen use among teens. It remarkable, on how much effort was put into this representation by the staff, teachers, and the students to spread a prominent awareness on the amount of the health and social issues screen addiction can create.

The delivery of each information, creativity shown in models, amd the overall experience was wonderful. After all, it was to help the children and adults recognize the complexity of the hours we let our children be glied to a screen. Excellent representation of scrutiny and analysis of the effects.

Though the facilties could appreciate a few changes. Such as restrooms to be more hygienic. Other than that, excellent.

My son is studying in the Lexicon Scholl class 1 C. He is studying in Lexicon school from last 3 years. He is just 6 years old. I would like to Thanks to Lexicon school and it's staff for C 2 B of 2023 program. The concept of C 2 B I really like alot. Caterpillar to Butterfly 🦋 it really reflects in the kids. The way kids were delivering the dialog on the stage it was really amazing. In small age of 6 years it's quite difficult but the school staff made it possible. Behind this success of the kids there is staff of Lexicon school special thanks to Rafaat mam who always motivated the kids by her theching method and building courage in kids. It was really surprising by looking at the discipline of the small kids folding hands while going on stage and while coming down from the stage. Really appreciated the efforts of entire staff who all were behind this to make it possible.
Thanks

Last week we had C2B program for class 2B, it was very well organised. Kids looked very participative and displayed confidence to the fullest. Their theme was digital currency and it was very well presented by them. Thanks to the teachers for their efforts and organising such a nice play. Special thanks to Shifa Ma'am.

Reeyansh Rohit Dhore (II D 2023-2024)
I am delighted to share my positive experience as a parent at Lexicon School Hadapsar in Pune, Maharashtra. This institution truly stands out for its commitment to providing an exceptional education and fostering holistic development.

From the moment we enrolled our child at Lexicon School Hadapsar, we were impressed by the caring and dedicated staff. The teachers here are not only highly knowledgeable but also incredibly passionate about nurturing young minds. They go above and beyond to make learning engaging and meaningful.

The academic curriculum is well-designed, striking the right balance between core subjects and co-curricular activities. My child has not only excelled in academics but has also had the opportunity to explore their creative talents through various art and sports programs.

What truly sets Lexicon School Hadapsar apart is its emphasis on character education. The school focuses on instilling values such as respect, empathy, and integrity in its students. I am thrilled to see my child not only growing academically but also becoming a responsible and well-rounded individual.

The school's infrastructure is top-notch, providing a conducive learning environment. The classrooms are equipped with modern technology, and the campus is spacious with well-maintained facilities, including a library and sports facilities.

Communication with the school has been seamless. Regular updates through parent-teacher meetings and digital platforms keep us informed about our child's progress. The school's approachability and willingness to address any concerns is highly appreciated.

Special thanks to all class 1 teachers and now
Class teacher Sumaiya maam,
Principal Dr. Annapurnalilly bipinraj maam
Neeta joshi maam
Trupti Mam

Reeyansh mentioned Trupti maam, Sumaiya maam and Vicky sir are my favourite.

In conclusion, Lexicon School Hadapsar has exceeded our expectations as parents. It has provided our child with an excellent education, a nurturing environment, and opportunities for all-round growth. I wholeheartedly recommend Lexicon School Hadapsar to fellow parents seeking a school that prioritizes academic excellence and character development.

My daughter Radhika Tengale has participated in C2B event held in Lexicon school on 10-Aug-2023.
Lexicon is one of the best schools in Pune which encourages students for personality development. Overall C2B event was good and well organized.
Thank you all teachers, class teachers,  staff and principal for organizing such wonderful event.
Here are some of pics from event. Thank you.

Best School in Hadapsar, Pune.
Special thanks to Swamini mam for putting extra efforts always. School always focus on studies and here in Lexicon School... one can easily notice lots of extra curricular activities as well.
Just an example : Today we attended C2B (Caterpillar 2 🦋) and just think about class 2 kids are talking about "Digital Currency", Digital Wallets, Crypto Currency. Thanks mam for executing this so nicely.
